rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF VELOIS STEELE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/10/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Proof of payment of the assessment fee must be filed before an accounting can be approved. (2) The number of shares of Computershare is missing from Schedule 1. (3) Please submit support for the receipt on 9/8/23 from the Richard Anderson Estate. No Supplemental I&A or a court order evidencing the distribution appears to have been filed. (4) Why is the estate paying for a safe deposit box? (5) No itemization of the legal costs paid on 4/14/23 appears to have been filed. (6) The Prudential dividend notice reflects a lower balance as of 11/16/23 than shown in the accounting as of 9/30/23. Deadline is 3/29/24 for providing the assigned examiner courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT WHITE ANBIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/10/2024. The following issued to be cleared two weeks prior: (1) Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (form DE-121) must be used. Prob. Code. sec. 8100. notice of directions for remote appearance must be given together. LRSF 14.1.C.6); (2) Need allegation regarding the presumption of revocation. Prob. Code sec. 6124. If the presumption applicable, allegation and evidence will be required to overcome the presumption of revocation; (3) Need information whether a foreign consulate needs to be noticed in relation to John Spilker. If applicable, a notice must be given Pursuant to sec. 8113; (4) Petitioner is not named to act as the personal rep in the will. Proposed Administrator with Will Annexed appears to be applicable, not Executor; (5) Will does not waive bond for Petitioner; (6) Need written declinations to act from the named executors The will named Bailey, King and Spilker as co-trustees to perform certain tasks; (7) Proposed order to include a copy of the lost will being offered to be admitted; and (8) A copy of the lost will being offered to probate must be separated submitted. LRSF 14.20. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE FREDDIE L. & MABEL I. FIELDS 2005 REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instruction To Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. APPEARANCE FOR NO RESPONSE: If a hearing is continued for issues raised by an examiner to be addressed and there is no response prior to the continued hearing date, the matter is automatically continued again, usually for one month. If there is still no response, an appearance is required. If no one appears after the automatic second continuance, the matter is ordinarily taken off calendar if it is not a compulsory petition, or an Order to Appear is issued. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT BENJAMIN CROSBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the Court to determine whether to take this petition off calendar for lack of progress, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 11/27/2023 - see also tentative rulings for 01/17/2024 & 02/14/2024 hearings) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-147 form is on file. 3) No DE-147S form is on file. This form must be filed confidentially and conventionally with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed or attached to any e-filed document). 4) No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 5) No proof of publication is on file. 6) Item 3e(3) (rather than 3e(2)) of the petition must be checked, if the decedent died intestate. 7) Item 3g(2)(b) must be checked. 8) Item 5a(3) or (4) must be checked. 9) Item 8: i) The petitioner must be listed. ii) The names and dates of death of all deceased children of the decedent must be listed. iii) The decedent's child who was a parent of each grandchild listed at item 8 must be identified. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
